-🔐Next-Auth v5(Auth.js)
-带有服务器操作的🚀Next.js 14
-🔑凭据提供程序

-🔒忘记密码功能
-✉️电子邮件验证
-📱双因素验证
-👥用户角色(管理员和用户)
-🔓登录组件(以重定向或模式打开)
-📝寄存器组件
-🤔忘记密码组件
-✅验证组件
-⚠️错误组件
-🔘登录按钮
-🚪注销按钮
-🚧角色门
-🔍探索next.js中间件
-📈扩展和探索下一次身份验证会话
-🔄探索下一次身份验证回调
-👤使用当前用户挂钩
-🛂使用角色挂钩
-🧑当前用户实用程序
-👮当前角色实用程序
-服务器组件的🖥️示例
-客户端组件的💻示例
-👑使用RoleGate组件为管理员呈现内容
-仅供管理员使用的🛡️保护应用编程接口路由
-仅针对管理员的🔐保护服务器操作
-📧使用设置页面中的新验证更改电子邮件
-🔑在设置页面中使用旧密码确认更改密码
-🔔在设置页面中启用/禁用双因素身份验证
-🔄更改设置页面中的用户角色(仅用于开发目的)节点版本18.7.xShell

01月04日.name: AntonioErdeljac /next-auth-v5-advanced-guide
01月04日.description:
Next Auth v5 - Advanced Guide (2024)This is a repository for Next Auth v5 - Advanced Guide (2024)VIDEO TUTORIALKey Features:
- 🔐 Next-auth v5 (Auth.js)
- 🚀 Next.js 14 with server actions
- 🔑 Credentials Provider
- 🌐 OAuth Provider (Social login with Google & GitHub)
- 🔒 Forgot password functionality
- ✉️ Email verification
- 📱 Two factor verification
- 👥 User roles (Admin & User)
- 🔓 Login component (Opens in redirect or modal)
- 📝 Register component
- 🤔 Forgot password component
- ✅ Verification component
- ⚠️ Error component
- 🔘 Login button
- 🚪 Logout button
- 🚧 Role Gate
- 🔍 Exploring next.js middleware
- 📈 Extending & Exploring next-auth session
- 🔄 Exploring next-auth callbacks
- 👤 useCurrentUser hook
- 🛂 useRole hook
- 🧑 currentUser utility
- 👮 currentRole utility
- 🖥️ Example with server component
- 💻 Example with client component
- 👑 Render content for admins using RoleGate component
- 🛡️ Protect API Routes for admins only
- 🔐 Protect Server Actions for admins only
- 📧 Change email with new verification in Settings page
- 🔑 Change password with old password confirmation in Settings page
- 🔔 Enable/disable two-factor auth in Settings page
- 🔄 Change user role in Settings page (for development purposes only)Node version 18.7.xshell
git clone https://github.com/AntonioErdeljac/next-auth-v5-advanced-guide.git

01月25日.zh_des: Orion-14B是一系列模型，包括14B基础LLM和一系列模型：聊天模型、长上下文模型、量化模型、RAG微调模型和代理微调模型。猎户座-14B系列模型包括一个具有140亿参数的多语言基座大模型以及一系列相关的衍生模型，包括对话模型，长文本模型，量化模型，RAG微调模型，特工微调模型等。
01月25日.name: OrionStarAI /Orion
01月25日.description: Orion-14B is a family of models includes a 14B foundation LLM, and a series of models: a chat model, a long context model, a quantized model, a RAG fine-tuned model, and an Agent fine-tuned model. 通过多模式大语言模型指导基于指令的图像编辑此报告此报告包含通过多模式大语言模型(ICLR‘24 Spotlight)指导基于指令的图像编辑的代码MGIE是
“基于多模式大语言模型的指导式图像编辑”
傅资瑞、胡文泽、杜宪志、王威廉、杨银飞、哲干
在2024国际学习表征会议(ICLR)上，基于指令的图像编辑通过自然命令提高了图像处理的可控性和灵活性，而不需要复杂的描述或区域掩模
02月08日.name: apple /ml-mgie
02月08日.description:
Guiding Instruction-based Image Editing via Multimodal Large Language Modelsgit clone this repoThis repo contains the code for Guiding Instruction-based Image Editing via Multimodal Large Language Models (ICLR'24 Spotlight)MGIE is an implementation of 
"Guiding Instruction-based Image Editing via Multimodal Large Language Models" 
Tsu-Jui Fu, Wenze Hu, Xianzhi Du, William Yang Wang, Yinfei Yang, and Zhe Gan 
in International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2024Instruction-based image editing improves the controllability and flexibility of image manipulation via natural commands without elaborate descriptions or regional masks
